name: Quaker's: Chewy Choc-Oat-Chip (Tm) Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the margarine and sugars until smooth.
3. Beat in the eggs, milk, and vanilla; mix well.
4. Stir in the flour, baking soda, and salt (if using); combine thoroughly.
5. Fold in the oats (quick or old-fashioned), semi-sweet chocolate pieces, and chopped nuts (if using).
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake 9 to 10 minutes for a chewy cookie or 12 to 12 minutes for a crisp cookie.
8. Cool cookies on the sheet for 1 minute; transfer to a wire rack and cool completely.
Easy Bar Cookies:
Press the cooled dough evenly into an ungreased 13x9-inch baking pan.
Bake at 375°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Cool completely before cutting into bars. Store tightly covered.
